title: Qlikview Training
description:
This Qlikview Training will teach you about system management data visualization and design best practices for building better experiences with guided analytics.

Qlikview training will first start with Qlikview introduction, why qlikview, Unique Features compared to Traditional BI Tools and Complete Dataware Housing Basics. The the course will take you through different Qlikview products like Desktop, Server, Pulisher and Accesspoint.

The Qlikview tutorial will further explain you about the Roles involved like what will be the role of Developer, Designer and Publisher. The Qlikview training will also introduce you to Data and Scripting where it will explain you about Relational Databases, Dimensional Data Structures, Comparing Data Models to QlikView Data Model, The QWT Primary Data Source, The QWT Secondary Data Files and many more other concepts.
